tEn: Hunyuan-Large: An Open-Source MoE Model with 52 Billion Activated Parameters by Tencent
tZh: Hunyuan-Large：腾讯开源MoE模型，520亿激活参数
sEn: Hunyuan-Large is the largest open-source MoE model with 389B total parameters and 52B activated, outperforming LLama3.1-70B and matching LLama3.1-405B.
sZh: Hunyuan-Large是最大的开源MoE模型，总参数量389B，激活参数52B，性能超越LLama3.1-70B，与更大的LLama3.1-405B相当。
absEn: In this paper, we introduce Hunyuan-Large, which is currently the largest open-source Transformer-based mixture of experts model, with a total of 389 billion parameters and 52 billion activation parameters, capable of handling up to 256K tokens. We conduct a thorough evaluation of Hunyuan-Large's superior performance across various benchmarks including language understanding and generation, logical reasoning, mathematical problem-solving, coding, long-context, and aggregated tasks, where it outperforms LLama3.1-70B and exhibits comparable performance when compared to the significantly larger LLama3.1-405B model. Key practice of Hunyuan-Large include large-scale synthetic data that is orders larger than in previous literature, a mixed expert routing strategy, a key-value cache compression technique, and an expert-specific learning rate strategy. Additionally, we also investigate the scaling laws and learning rate schedule of mixture of experts models, providing valuable insights and guidances for future model development and optimization. The code and checkpoints of Hunyuan-Large are released to facilitate future innovations and applications. Codes: https://github.com/Tencent/Hunyuan-Large Models: https://huggingface.co/tencent/Tencent-Hunyuan-Large
absZh: 本文介绍了Hunyuan-Large，这是目前最大的开源基于Transformer的混合专家模型，总参数量达3890亿，激活参数520亿，可处理高达256K个token。我们在语言理解与生成、逻辑推理、数学问题求解、编程、长上下文及聚合任务等多个基准上对Hunyuan-Large进行了全面评估，其性能优于LLama3.1-70B，并与规模更大的LLama3.1-405B模型表现相当。Hunyuan-Large的关键实践包括：比以往文献大数个数量级的大规模合成数据、混合专家路由策略、键值缓存压缩技术以及专家特定的学习率策略。此外，我们还研究了混合专家模型的缩放规律和学习率调度，为未来模型开发和优化提供了宝贵的见解和指导。我们已开源Hunyuan-Large的代码和检查点，以促进未来的创新和应用。代码：https://github.com/Tencent/Hunyuan-Large 模型：https://huggingface.co/tencent/Tencent-Hunyuan-Large

contrib.en: Open-sourced the largest Transformer-based MoE model with 389B total and 52B activated parameters.
contrib.zh: 开源了最大的基于Transformer的MoE模型，总参数量389B，激活参数量52B。

contrib.en: Proposed mixed expert routing with shared and specialized experts, and recycle routing to reduce token dropping.
contrib.zh: 提出了混合专家路由策略，包含共享专家和专用专家，以及回收路由以减少token丢弃。

contrib.en: Introduced KV cache compression combining GQA and CLA, saving nearly 95% memory.
contrib.zh: 引入了结合GQA和CLA的KV缓存压缩技术，节省近95%内存。

contrib.en: Developed expert-specific learning rate scaling based on effective batch size differences.
contrib.zh: 基于有效批次大小差异，开发了专家特定的学习率缩放策略。

contrib.en: Investigated MoE scaling laws to guide optimal model size and training data volume.
contrib.zh: 研究了MoE缩放定律，指导最优模型规模和训练数据量。

contrib.en: Achieved superior performance on diverse benchmarks, outperforming LLama3.1-70B and matching LLama3.1-405B.
contrib.zh: 在多种基准测试中取得优异性能，超越LLama3.1-70B，与LLama3.1-405B相当。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to English and Chinese benchmarks; multilingual generalization not fully assessed.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于中英文基准测试，多语言泛化能力未充分评估。

limits.en: Synthetic data quality depends on seed data and generation models, which may introduce biases.
limits.zh: 合成数据质量依赖于种子数据和生成模型，可能引入偏差。

limits.en: Long-context capability tested up to 256K tokens; performance beyond this length is unknown.
limits.zh: 长上下文能力测试至256K token，超出此长度的性能未知。

limits.en: Post-training alignment relies on DPO with offline and online data; potential reward hacking not fully mitigated.
limits.zh: 后训练对齐依赖DPO和离线/在线数据，奖励黑客问题未完全缓解。

limits.en: Scaling law experiments conducted on small models (10M-1B); extrapolation to 52B may have inaccuracies.
limits.zh: 缩放定律实验基于小模型（10M-1B），外推至52B可能存在不准确性。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce Hunyuan-Large, which is currently the largest open-source Transformer-based mixture of experts model, with a total of 389 billion parameters and 52 billion activation parameters, capable of handling up to 256K tokens. We conduct a thorough evaluation of Hunyuan-Large’s superior performance across various benchmarks including language understanding and generation, logical reasoning, mathematical problem-solving, coding, long-context, and aggregated tasks, where it outperforms LLama3.1-70B and exhibits comparable performance when compared to the significantly larger LLama3.1-405B model. Key practice of Hunyuan-Large include large-scale synthetic data that is orders larger than in previous literature, a mixed expert routing strategy, a key-value cache compression technique, and an expert-specific learning rate strategy. Additionally, we also investigate the scaling laws and learning rate schedule of mixture of experts models, providing valuable insights and guidances for future model development and optimization. The code and checkpoints of Hunyuan-Large are released to facilitate future innovations and applications.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了Hunyuan-Large，这是目前最大的开源基于Transformer的混合专家模型，总参数量为3890亿，激活参数量为520亿，能够处理多达256K个token。我们对Hunyuan-Large在各种基准测试中的卓越性能进行了全面评估，包括语言理解与生成、逻辑推理、数学问题求解、编程、长上下文和聚合任务，其性能优于LLama3.1-70B，并与规模更大的LLama3.1-405B模型表现相当。Hunyuan-Large的关键实践包括：大规模合成数据（其规模比以往文献中高出数个数量级）、混合专家路由策略、键值缓存压缩技术以及专家特定的学习率策略。此外，我们还研究了混合专家模型的缩放定律和学习率调度，为未来模型的开发和优化提供了宝贵的见解和指导。Hunyuan-Large的代码和检查点已发布，以促进未来的创新和应用。

items.en: Code: https://github.com/Tencent/Tencent-Hunyuan-Large Models: https://huggingface.co/tencent/Tencent-Hunyuan-Large
items.zh: 代码：https://github.com/Tencent/Tencent-Hunyuan-Large 模型：https://huggingface.co/tencent/Tencent-Hunyuan-Large

items.en: In recent years, Large language models (LLMs) have significantly advanced the field of artificial intelligence, proving their effectiveness across numerous fields such as NLP, CV, Speech, and AI4Science. Starting from the emergence of ChatGPT (OpenAI, 2022), lots of powerful LLMs have bloomed (Achiam et al., 2023; Gemini et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023; OpenAI, 2024; Dubey et al., 2024; Qwen, 2024a), which inexorably bring in new ways for people to collect and process information, broadly impacting our daily lives. As the demand for more sophisticated AI systems continues to grow, researchers are exploring new techniques and paradigms to push the boundaries of model size and performance. One approach that stands out is the Mixture of Experts (MoE) model, which synergizes multiple specialized submodels to deliver superior performance in diverse tasks with dynamic activated experts (Lepikhin et al., 2020; Fedus et al., 2022; Wang et al., 2024a), achieving more efficient training and inference. There is a current trend observed that more and more MoE-structured LLMs have been constructed and open-sourced to facilitate the LLM community (Mistral, 2024; DeepSeek-AI, 2024; Yang et al., 2024; Jamba et al., 2024).
items.zh: 近年来，大型语言模型（LLM）显著推动了人工智能领域的发展，在自然语言处理、计算机视觉、语音和AI4科学等多个领域证明了其有效性。从ChatGPT（OpenAI，2022）的出现开始，许多强大的LLM如雨后春笋般涌现（Achiam等人，2023；Gemini等人，2023；Touvron等人，2023；OpenAI，2024；Dubey等人，2024；Qwen，2024a），这不可避免地带来了人们收集和处理信息的新方式，广泛影响了我们的日常生活。随着对更复杂AI系统的需求不断增长，研究人员正在探索新的技术和范式，以突破模型规模和性能的界限。其中一种突出的方法是混合专家（MoE）模型，它通过动态激活的专家协同多个专门子模型，在各种任务中提供卓越性能（Lepikhin等人，2020；Fedus等人，2022；Wang等人，2024a），实现更高效的训练和推理。目前观察到一种趋势，越来越多的MoE结构LLM被构建并开源，以促进LLM社区的发展（Mistral，2024；DeepSeek-AI，2024；Yang等人，2024；Jamba等人，2024）。

items.en: Tencent’s AI chatbot, Yuanbao (yuanbao.tencent.com), has also adopted MoE as the neural architecture of the trillion-parameter flagship LLM since February 2024. Due to its exceptional capabilities in reading, writing, and searching, the MoE-based Hunyuan model and Yuanbao chatbot are assisting users in working effortlessly and enjoying a more vibrant life. The MoE-powered Hunyuan models have also enhanced thousands of scenarios within Tencent’s applications, enabling Tencent to better serve its billions of users.
items.zh: 腾讯的AI聊天机器人元宝（yuanbao.tencent.com）自2024年2月起也采用了MoE作为万亿参数旗舰LLM的神经架构。凭借其在阅读、写作和搜索方面的卓越能力，基于MoE的混元模型和元宝聊天机器人正在帮助用户轻松工作，享受更丰富多彩的生活。MoE驱动的混元模型还增强了腾讯应用中的数千个场景，使腾讯能够更好地服务其数十亿用户。

items.en: In addition to serving users with the premium models, another way that contributes to the community is open-sourcing. Open-source models can greatly promote the spreading of technology and flourishing development of applications, as exemplified by LLama, Mistral, Qwen, and Deepseek, among others. However, most open-source models are based on dense architectures, with only a very few models based on the MoE architecture with relatively small scale of parameters. In this work, we introduce Hunyuan-Large, a large Transformer-based MoE model, featuring an unprecedented 389 billion total parameters and 52 billion activated parameters, capable of handling up to 256K tokens. This model adopts the classical Transformer architecture (Vaswani et al., 2017) with MoE, containing a pre-training stage for acquiring fundamental capabilities and a post-training stage for task-specific instruction following, capability enhancement, and human preference alignment. Hunyuan-Large supports conventional NLP abilities such as question answering, reasoning, reading comprehension, and specific LLM capabilities such as mathematics, coding, multi-turn interaction, and multilinguality.
items.zh: 除了为用户提供优质模型外，另一种贡献社区的方式是开源。开源模型可以极大地促进技术的传播和应用的蓬勃发展，例如LLama、Mistral、Qwen和Deepseek等。然而，大多数开源模型基于密集架构，只有极少数模型基于MoE架构且参数规模相对较小。在这项工作中，我们介绍了Hunyuan-Large，一个大型基于Transformer的MoE模型，拥有前所未有的3890亿总参数和520亿激活参数，能够处理多达256K个token。该模型采用经典的Transformer架构（Vaswani等人，2017）与MoE，包括用于获取基本能力的预训练阶段和用于任务特定指令遵循、能力增强和人类偏好对齐的后训练阶段。Hunyuan-Large支持传统的自然语言处理能力，如问答、推理、阅读理解，以及特定的LLM能力，如数学、编程、多轮交互和多语言。

items.en: We delve into the key technical innovations that have contributed to Hunyuan-Large’s exceptional performance as follows.
items.zh: 我们深入探讨了促成Hunyuan-Large卓越性能的关键技术创新，如下所述。

items.en: High-Quality Synthetic Data. The broad usage of synthetic data improves the quality and diversity of training data, which enables the model to learn richer representations effectively and generalize better to unseen data. In total, Hunyuan-Large is pre-trained on 7T tokens, which contains nearly 1.5T tokens of high-quality and diverse synthetic data.
items.zh: 高质量合成数据。合成数据的广泛使用提高了训练数据的质量和多样性，使模型能够有效学习更丰富的表示，并更好地泛化到未见数据。总体而言，Hunyuan-Large在7T个token上进行了预训练，其中包含近1.5T个token的高质量多样化合成数据。

items.en: Enhanced Model Structure. We propose key-value (KV) cache compression, recycle routing, and expert-specific learning rate scaling strategies to enhance Hunyuan-Large. The reduction of KV cache overhead allows for more seamless deployment and scaling. Moreover, we adopt different learning rates for different shared/specialized experts with our recycle routing strategy, ensuring that each token can be utilized effectively during training and contributing to the overall performance.
items.zh: 增强的模型结构。我们提出了键值（KV）缓存压缩、循环路由和专家特定学习率缩放策略来增强Hunyuan-Large。KV缓存开销的减少使得部署和扩展更加无缝。此外，我们通过循环路由策略对不同的共享/专门专家采用不同的学习率，确保每个token在训练期间都能被有效利用，从而提升整体性能。

items.en: Explorations on MoE Scaling Laws. Additionally, we explore the scaling laws of MoE models as our guidelines, highlighting the relationship between model size, training data, and performance. This analysis offers insights into the foundational elements that contribute to the strong performance of Hunyuan-Large, but also provides valuable insights for future development and optimization of more powerful and larger MoE-structured LLMs.
items.zh: MoE缩放定律的探索。此外，我们探索了MoE模型的缩放定律作为指导，突出了模型大小、训练数据和性能之间的关系。这一分析不仅揭示了构成Hunyuan-Large强大性能的基础要素，还为未来开发和优化更强大、更大的MoE结构LLM提供了宝贵的见解。

items.en: To demonstrate the power of Hunyuan-Large, we conduct extensive experiments on diverse types of benchmarks in both English and Chinese, compared with the best-performing dense and MoE models having similar parameter sizes. We find that Hunyuan-Large is capable of handling various tasks including commonsense understanding, question answering, mathematics reasoning, coding, and aggregated tasks, achieving the overall best performance among existing open-source similar-scale LLMs. The pre-trained and post-trained Hunyuan-Large models are publicly released to facilitate the LLM community.
items.zh: 为了展示Hunyuan-Large的强大能力，我们在中英文多种类型的基准测试上进行了广泛实验，与具有相似参数规模的最佳性能密集和MoE模型进行了比较。我们发现Hunyuan-Large能够处理各种任务，包括常识理解、问答、数学推理、编程和聚合任务，在现有开源相似规模LLM中实现了整体最佳性能。预训练和后训练的Hunyuan-Large模型已公开发布，以促进LLM社区的发展。

items.en: In the rest of this technical report, we will first give a detailed introduction to the pre-training stage of Hunyuan-Large, including its data and tokenizer, model structure, and pre-training recipes in Section 2. Next, we will describe our post-training in Section 3, with details of our SFT and RLHF techniques. The comprehensive experimental results and in-depth analyses of Hunyuan-Large’s pre-trained and post-trained models will be given in Section 4. Finally, the conclusion and future direction will be stated in Section 5.
items.zh: 在本技术报告的其余部分，我们将在第2节首先详细介绍Hunyuan-Large的预训练阶段，包括其数据和分词器、模型结构以及预训练配方。接下来，我们将在第3节描述后训练，包括SFT和RLHF技术的细节。第4节将给出Hunyuan-Large预训练和后训练模型的全面实验结果和深入分析。最后，第5节将陈述结论和未来方向。

items.en: In this section, we will describe the details of pre-training Hunyuan-Large, including (a) data and tokenizer, where high-quality data largely contributes to the model performance, (b) model structure, consisting of our proposed KV cache compression, expert routing, and expert-specific learning rate scaling strategies, and (c) pre-training recipes, introducing the detailed pre-training schedule as well as our guidebook of explorations on MoE scaling laws. These techniques build the foundation of Hunyuan-Large’s remarkable capability in pre-training.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将描述Hunyuan-Large预训练的细节，包括（a）数据和分词器，其中高质量数据对模型性能贡献巨大；（b）模型结构，包括我们提出的KV缓存压缩、专家路由和专家特定学习率缩放策略；（c）预训练配方，介绍详细的预训练计划以及我们对MoE缩放定律的探索指南。这些技术为Hunyuan-Large在预训练中的卓越能力奠定了基础。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The four-step process of data synthesis in Hunyuan-Large’s pre-training: (1) Instruction generation, (2) Instruction evolution, (3) Response generation, and (4) Response filtering.
items.capZh: 图1：Hunyuan-Large预训练中数据合成的四步过程：（1）指令生成，（2）指令演化，（3）响应生成，（4）响应过滤。

items.en: We first give the overview of our data, which is viewed as the fuel of our powerful model, with its preprocessing steps and data synthesis strategies essential for the quantity and quality of data. We also introduce the tokenizer employed for converting text data into an appropriate format suitable for Hunyuan-Large.
items.zh: 我们首先概述我们的数据，这些数据被视为我们强大模型的燃料，其预处理步骤和数据合成策略对数据的数量和质量至关重要。我们还介绍了用于将文本数据转换为适合Hunyuan-Large的适当格式的分词器。

items.en: To start with, we provide a brief overview of the used pre-training data, and then delve deeper into the specifics of our synthetic data generation process, which is essential for acquiring capabilities also verified in various LLMs (Dubey et al., 2024; Abdin et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024).
items.zh: 首先，我们简要概述所使用的预训练数据，然后深入探讨合成数据生成过程的细节，这对于获取能力至关重要，这一点也在各种LLM中得到了验证（Dubey等人，2024；Abdin等人，2024；Liu等人，2024）。

items.en: Data Overview and Processing. We aim to create a high-quality, safe, and diverse training dataset for pre-training, primarily consisting of Chinese and English languages for practical demands. We filter the data based on criteria such as writing quality, educational value, and toxicity to ensure its high quality. Additionally, we anonymize all privacy-sensitive data and other harmful data. We have also implemented an elaborate system of category labels, which allows us to flexibly adjust the proportions of various types of data in the training dataset.
items.zh: 数据概述与处理。我们的目标是创建一个高质量、安全且多样化的预训练训练数据集，主要包含中文和英文以满足实际需求。我们根据写作质量、教育价值和毒性等标准过滤数据，以确保其高质量。此外，我们对所有隐私敏感数据和其他有害数据进行匿名化处理。我们还实现了一个精细的类别标签系统，使我们能够灵活调整训练数据集中各类数据的比例。

items.en: Data Synthesis. Besides the existing natural text corpus, we construct large amounts of synthetic data to specifically boost the knowledge acquisition against the relative capability deficiency merely learned from natural data. To make full use of synthetic data to enhance model performance, we mainly focus on the mathematics, coding, low-resource, and high-educational-value fields that are good supplements to naturally distributed corpus, meeting three key requirements of quality, diversity, and quantity.
items.zh: 数据合成。除了现有的自然文本语料库，我们构建了大量合成数据，以专门提升知识获取能力，弥补仅从自然数据中学习到的相对能力不足。为了充分利用合成数据提升模型性能，我们主要关注数学、编程、低资源和高教育价值领域，这些领域是对自然分布语料库的良好补充，满足质量、多样性和数量三个关键要求。

items.en: As shown in Figure 1, we synthesize high-quality instruction data through a four-step process, including instruction generation, instruction evolution, response generation, and response filtering.
items.zh: 如图1所示，我们通过四步过程合成高质量的指令数据，包括指令生成、指令演化、响应生成和响应过滤。

items.en: Step 1: Instruction Generation. To ensure the diversity of instructions, we use high-quality, knowledge-rich data sources such as web pages, web-based question-answering data, code repositories, books, and other resources as seeds. Cooperating with diverse instruction generation prompts, these seeds enable us to generate a wide variety of instructions that cover various domains with different desired instruction styles and complexities.
items.zh: 步骤1：指令生成。为确保指令的多样性，我们使用高质量、知识丰富的数据源作为种子，如网页、基于网络的问答数据、代码仓库、书籍和其他资源。结合多样化的指令生成提示，这些种子使我们能够生成涵盖不同领域、具有不同期望指令风格和复杂性的各种指令。

items.en: Step 2: Instruction Evolution. To further improve the quality of these initial instructions, we refine them by three guidelines: (a) Enhancing their clarity and informativeness. (b) Expanding low-resource domain instructions through self-instruct augmentation. (c) Evolving the instructions to increase their difficulty levels. These evolved high-quality and challenging instructions enable our model to benefit more efficiently from synthetic data to cross the original capability boundaries.
items.zh: 步骤2：指令演化。为进一步提高这些初始指令的质量，我们通过三个指导原则对其进行改进：（a）增强其清晰度和信息量。（b）通过自指令增强扩展低资源领域指令。（c）演化指令以增加其难度级别。这些演化后的高质量和挑战性指令使我们的模型能够更有效地从合成数据中受益，从而跨越原始能力边界。

items.en: Step 3: Response Generation. We utilize several specialized models to generate informative and accurate answers for the above evolved instructions. These models vary in size and are well-designed specialized models to synthesize expert-level responses for instructions in various domains.
items.zh: 步骤3：响应生成。我们利用多个专门模型为上述演化指令生成信息丰富且准确的答案。这些模型大小各异，是精心设计的专门模型，用于为不同领域的指令合成专家级响应。

items.en: Step 4: Response Filtering. To filter the synthetic instruction-response pairs, we employ a critique model and conduct self-consistency checks, in which we generate multiple answers to perform self-consistency filtering for tasks such as objective question-answering tasks, ensuring the reliability and accuracy. This process allows us to effectively remove any low-quality or inconsistent data, ensuring the utilization of high-quality text in pre-training.
items.zh: 步骤4：响应过滤。为了过滤合成的指令-响应对，我们采用一个评判模型并进行自一致性检查，即生成多个答案以对客观问答等任务执行自一致性过滤，确保可靠性和准确性。这一过程使我们能够有效移除任何低质量或不一致的数据，确保在预训练中使用高质量文本。

items.en: The tokenizer is a vital component for effectiveness and efficiency in pre-training, which should balance two critical factors: (a) achieving a high compression rate for efficient training and inference, and (b) maintaining an appropriately large vocabulary to ensure adequate learning of each word embedding. In Hunyuan-Large, we carefully consider both aspects and employ a vocabulary consisting of 128K tokens. This token vocabulary is a combination of 100K tokens from the tiktoken tokenizer (OpenAI, 2023) and an additional 28K tokens specifically designed to enhance Chinese language support. Notably, when compared to the LLama3.1 tokenizer, our new tokenizer exhibits improved compression rates, increasing from 2.78 to 3.13 characters per token.
items.zh: 分词器是预训练中影响效果和效率的关键组件，需要平衡两个关键因素：(a) 实现高压缩率以高效训练和推理，(b) 保持足够大的词汇量以确保每个词嵌入的充分学习。在Hunyuan-Large中，我们仔细考虑了这两个方面，采用了包含128K个标记的词汇表。该词汇表由tiktoken分词器（OpenAI, 2023）的100K个标记和额外28K个专门用于增强中文支持的标记组成。值得注意的是，与LLama3.1分词器相比，我们的新分词器压缩率从每个标记2.78个字符提升至3.13个字符。

items.en: Hunyuan-Large is equipped with superior model structure and training strategies to achieve impressive LLM capabilities. We first show the overview of model architecture and hyper-parameters, and then delve into the KV cache compression, expert routing strategy, and expert-specific learning rate scaling used in our model with details.
items.zh: Hunyuan-Large配备了优越的模型结构和训练策略，以实现令人印象深刻的LLM能力。我们首先展示模型架构和超参数的概览，然后详细介绍KV缓存压缩、专家路由策略和专家特定学习率缩放。

items.en: The model structure of Hunyuan-Large mainly follows the classical MoE structure that uses multiple experts to replace the original FFN in Transformer. Tokens will be assigned to different experts, and only a small ratio of experts will be activated in training. Hunyuan-Large consists of both shared and specialized experts. We use Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) for position learning (Su et al., 2024) and SwiGLU for activation (Shazeer, 2020). Table 1 displays the overview of our model’s architecture and key hyper-parameters.
items.zh: Hunyuan-Large的模型结构主要遵循经典的MoE结构，即使用多个专家替换Transformer中的原始FFN。标记将被分配给不同的专家，且训练中仅激活一小部分专家。Hunyuan-Large包含共享专家和专门专家。我们使用旋转位置嵌入（RoPE）进行位置学习（Su et al., 2024），并使用SwiGLU作为激活函数（Shazeer, 2020）。表1展示了我们模型的架构和关键超参数概览。

items.en: To alleviate memory pressure of KV cache and reduce the cost during inference, we jointly integrate two classical strategies for KV cache compression: (a) Grouped-Query Attention (GQA) (Ainslie et al., 2023), which uses an intermediate number of KV heads to form head groups, compressing KV cache from the head aspect, and (b) Cross-Layer Attention (CLA) (Brandon et al., 2024), which shares the KV cache between adjacent layers, compressing KV cache from the layer aspect. In Hunyuan-Large, we set 888 groups of KV heads for GQA, and share KV cache every 222 layers, jointly considering both effectiveness and efficiency. Table 2 presents a comparison of the KV cache memory usage across different mechanisms. The adopted GQA+CLA technique in Hunyuan-Large saves nearly 95% KV cache in total compared to the original MHA mechanism, significantly improving the inference efficiency without much side effect on model performance.
items.zh: 为了缓解KV缓存的内存压力并降低推理成本，我们联合集成了两种经典的KV缓存压缩策略：(a) 分组查询注意力（GQA）（Ainslie et al., 2023），它使用中间数量的KV头形成头组，从头维度压缩KV缓存；(b) 跨层注意力（CLA）（Brandon et al., 2024），它在相邻层之间共享KV缓存，从层维度压缩KV缓存。在Hunyuan-Large中，我们为GQA设置了888组KV头，并每222层共享一次KV缓存，综合考虑了效果和效率。表2展示了不同机制下KV缓存内存使用的比较。Hunyuan-Large采用的GQA+CLA技术相比原始MHA机制总共节省了近95%的KV缓存，显著提升了推理效率，且对模型性能影响很小。

items.en: Shared and Specialized Experts. The expert routing strategy of MoE is essential to efficiently activate each expert’s capability while maintaining a relatively balanced load. Conventional routing strategies, such as the classical top-k routing strategy, selects the top-k scoring experts to process each token (Jiang et al., 2024; Qwen, 2024b). Hunyuan-Large adopts a mixed routing strategy, that uses both a shared expert consumed by all tokens and several routable experts employing the classical top-k routing strategy 111This mixed routing strategy was first introduced in our closed-source trillion-parameter model (training starts from November, 2023) concurrently to Deepseek v2.. Hunyuan-Large sets 1 expert as the shared expert to capture the common knowledge required by all tokens. Besides, 16 specialized experts are allocated to dynamically learn domain-specific knowledge, activating the top-111 scoring specialized expert for each token. Recycle Routing. Conventional top-k routing often cooperates with a capacity factor that defines the maximum load of an expert in MoE, where tokens of overloaded experts are discarded during training. A larger capacity factor results in less dropped tokens but reduced training efficiency. Excessive token dropping may cause the loss of crucial information, which in turn negatively impacts training stability. To address this problem and achieve more balanced training in efficiency and stability, we develop a new recycle routing strategy for tokens discarded during the original top-k routing process, as displayed in Figure 2. This technique entails an additional random allocation for tokens originally routed to overloaded experts to other specialized experts which have not exceeded their capacity. This approach strives to preserve vital information while simultaneously optimizing training efficiency, thus ensuring the overall effectiveness and efficiency of model training.
items.zh: 共享专家与专门专家。MoE的专家路由策略对于高效激活每个专家的能力同时保持相对均衡的负载至关重要。传统的路由策略，如经典的top-k路由策略，选择得分最高的k个专家处理每个标记（Jiang et al., 2024; Qwen, 2024b）。Hunyuan-Large采用混合路由策略，即使用一个所有标记共享的共享专家和多个采用经典top-k路由策略的可路由专家¹。Hunyuan-Large设置1个专家作为共享专家，以捕获所有标记所需的通用知识。此外，分配16个专门专家动态学习领域特定知识，为每个标记激活得分最高的1个专门专家。回收路由。传统的top-k路由通常与容量因子配合使用，该因子定义了MoE中专家的最大负载，过载专家的标记在训练中被丢弃。较大的容量因子导致丢弃的标记较少，但训练效率降低。过多的标记丢弃可能导致关键信息丢失，进而对训练稳定性产生负面影响。为了解决这个问题并在效率和稳定性之间实现更平衡的训练，我们开发了一种新的回收路由策略，用于处理在原始top-k路由过程中被丢弃的标记，如图2所示。该技术涉及将原本路由到过载专家的标记随机重新分配给其他未超过容量的专门专家。这种方法旨在保留重要信息，同时优化训练效率，从而确保模型训练的整体效果和效率。

items.en: We adopt AdamW (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2019) as our optimizer. To expedite training, we can increase the learning rate in tandem with the growth of batch size in pre-training. Previous work has explored the square root scaling (Krizhevsky, 2014) or linear scaling (Goyal et al., 2017) when discovering the optimal learning rate based on the batch size for SGD-style optimizers. Recent work has elucidated a more appropriate connection between the optimal learning rates and batch sizes for Adam-style optimizers in LLMs. According to Li et al. (2024a), the optimal learning rate ϵo​p​t​(B)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝑜𝑝𝑡𝐵\epsilon_{opt}(B) for a batch size B𝐵B is calculated as:
items.zh: 我们采用AdamW（Loshchilov & Hutter, 2019）作为优化器。为了加速训练，我们可以随着预训练中批次大小的增长而提高学习率。先前的工作探索了SGD风格优化器在根据批次大小确定最优学习率时的平方根缩放（Krizhevsky, 2014）或线性缩放（Goyal et al., 2017）。最近的工作阐明了LLM中Adam风格优化器的最优学习率与批次大小之间更合适的联系。根据Li et al. (2024a)，批次大小B的最优学习率ϵ_opt(B)计算如下：

items.en: Here, ϵm​a​xsubscriptitalic-ϵ𝑚𝑎𝑥\epsilon_{max} represents the learning rate of AdamW. ℬn​o​i​s​esubscriptℬ𝑛𝑜𝑖𝑠𝑒\mathcal{B}_{noise} indicates the trade-off point between training speed and data efficiency noted in Kaplan et al. (2020).
items.zh: 这里，ϵ_max表示AdamW的学习率。ℬ_noise表示Kaplan et al. (2020)中提到的训练速度与数据效率之间的权衡点。

items.en: However, in Hunyuan-Large, different experts are imbalanced in the aspect of trained tokens (e.g., comparing the shared expert with other specialized experts). The number of tokens processed by each expert during a single iteration will vary, which indicates that each expert will experience a different effective batch size within one training iteration. Hence, it is essential to necessitate expert-specific learning rates to optimize training efficiency. Considering the load balance losses, we could safely assume that different specialized experts have approximately similar numbers of effectively trained tokens. Specifically for specialized experts, the effective batch size should be roughly divided by the number of specialized experts, resulting in their optimal learning rate being expressed as ϵo​p​t​(B/n)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝑜𝑝𝑡𝐵𝑛\epsilon_{opt}({B}/{n}) (we activate 1 in 16 specialized experts and thus n=16𝑛16n=16). The learning rate scaling ratio between the shared and specialized experts is ϵo​p​t​(B)/ϵo​p​t​(B/n)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝑜𝑝𝑡𝐵subscriptitalic-ϵ𝑜𝑝𝑡𝐵𝑛\epsilon_{opt}(B)/\epsilon_{opt}({B}/{n}), which is approximately 0.310.310.31 in our setting. Consequently, when configuring the learning rate for Hunyuan-Large, we assign the optimal ϵo​p​t​(B)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝑜𝑝𝑡𝐵\epsilon_{opt}(B) for the shared expert, and deliberately scale down the learning rate of specialized experts in accordance with this ratio ϵo​p​t​(B)/ϵo​p​t​(B/n)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝑜𝑝𝑡𝐵subscriptitalic-ϵ𝑜𝑝𝑡𝐵𝑛\epsilon_{opt}(B)/\epsilon_{opt}({B}/{n}).
items.zh: 然而，在Hunyuan-Large中，不同专家在训练标记数量方面是不平衡的（例如，比较共享专家与其他专门专家）。每次迭代中每个专家处理的标记数量会有所不同，这意味着每个专家在一次训练迭代中会经历不同的有效批次大小。因此，有必要采用专家特定的学习率来优化训练效率。考虑到负载平衡损失，我们可以安全地假设不同的专门专家具有大致相似的有效训练标记数量。具体来说，对于专门专家，有效批次大小应大致除以专门专家的数量，因此其最优学习率表示为ϵ_opt(B/n)（我们激活16个专门专家中的1个，因此n=16）。共享专家与专门专家之间的学习率缩放比例为ϵ_opt(B)/ϵ_opt(B/n)，在我们的设置中约为0.31。因此，在配置Hunyuan-Large的学习率时，我们为共享专家分配最优的ϵ_opt(B)，并按照该比例ϵ_opt(B)/ϵ_opt(B/n)有意降低专门专家的学习率。

items.en: The effectiveness of LLM pre-training is not solely determined by the dataset and model structure, but also significantly ascribed to the pre-training recipes obtained from empirical experiments. We first explore the scaling laws of MoE functioned as a guidebook for our model design. Secondly, we introduce the detailed process of annealing and long-context pre-training, which further enhance LLM’s capability.
items.zh: LLM预训练的效果不仅取决于数据集和模型结构，还显著归因于从经验实验中获得的预训练方案。我们首先探索MoE的缩放定律，作为模型设计的指南。其次，我们介绍退火和长上下文预训练的详细过程，这进一步增强了LLM的能力。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Using quadratic polynomial fitting, we obtain the scaling law of the optimal number of activation parameters under different minimum compute budgets.
items.capZh: 图3：使用二次多项式拟合，我们得到了不同最小算力预算下最优激活参数数量的缩放定律。

items.en: Initially, we investigate the scaling laws of MoE models to identify optimal settings and gain insights before pre-training. Typically, the training compute budget for dense models is estimated using C=6​N​D𝐶6𝑁𝐷C=6ND, where N𝑁N represents the number of parameters and D𝐷D denotes the training tokens. However, for MoE models with longer sequences (e.g., 8K, 32K, and 256K), the compute budget formula varies due to attention complexity and sparse activation. Upon meticulous computation, we ascertain the precise compute budget C𝐶C for MoE models, where N𝑁N in our formula represents the number of activated parameters, is as follows:
items.zh: 最初，我们研究MoE模型的缩放定律，以确定最优设置并在预训练前获得见解。通常，密集模型的训练算力预算使用C=6ND估计，其中N表示参数数量，D表示训练标记数。然而，对于具有较长序列（例如8K、32K和256K）的MoE模型，由于注意力复杂性和稀疏激活，算力预算公式有所不同。经过仔细计算，我们确定了MoE模型的精确算力预算C，其中公式中的N表示激活参数数量，如下所示：

items.en: Drawing on the insights of Kaplan et al. (2020) and Li et al. (2024a), we acknowledge that batch size B𝐵B has a significant impact on compute budget C𝐶C during training. To isolate this effect and derive precise estimates, we employ the critical batch size Bc​r​i​t​(L)subscript𝐵𝑐𝑟𝑖𝑡𝐿B_{crit}(L), which optimizes the trade-off between time and computational efficiency, ultimately resulting in minimal compute budget Cm​i​nsubscript𝐶𝑚𝑖𝑛C_{min}:
items.zh: 借鉴Kaplan et al. (2020)和Li et al. (2024a)的见解，我们认识到批次大小B在训练中对算力预算C有显著影响。为了隔离这种影响并获得精确估计，我们采用临界批次大小B_crit(L)，它优化了时间与计算效率之间的权衡，最终得到最小算力预算C_min：

items.en: Subsequently, we meticulously trained a series of MoE models, spanning from 10 M to 1B activation parameters, utilizing 100B tokens of pre-training data. By leveraging the isoFLOPs (Hoffmann et al., 2022) curve, we determined the optimal number of active parameters and training data volume within a restricted compute budget, adjusted according to the actual training token batch size, through an exploration of these models across data sizes ranging from 10B to 100B tokens.
items.zh: 随后，我们精心训练了一系列MoE模型，参数范围从10M到1B激活参数，使用了100B标记的预训练数据。通过利用isoFLOPs（Hoffmann et al., 2022）曲线，我们确定了在受限算力预算下最优的激活参数数量和训练数据量，并根据实际训练标记批次大小进行调整，通过探索这些模型在10B到100B标记数据范围内的表现。

items.en: By fitting the formula No​p​t=Nc​Cm​i​nαsubscript𝑁𝑜𝑝𝑡subscript𝑁𝑐superscriptsubscript𝐶𝑚𝑖𝑛𝛼N_{opt}=N_{c}C_{min}^{\alpha} in Figure 3, we obtain Nc=5.9×10−3subscript𝑁𝑐5.9superscript103N_{c}=5.9\times 10^{-3} and α=0.5305𝛼0.5305\alpha=0.5305, indicating that the optimal number of activated parameters is approximately 58.1B. Inspired by Dubey et al. (2024), due to the smoothness of the quadratic curve around the optimal value, we ultimately select 52B as the number of activated parameters in our model.
items.zh: 通过拟合图3中的公式N_opt = N_c C_min^α，我们得到N_c = 5.9×10^{-3}，α = 0.5305，表明最优激活参数数量约为58.1B。受Dubey et al. (2024)启发，由于最优值附近二次曲线的平滑性，我们最终选择52B作为模型中的激活参数数量。

items.en: Further, by fitting the formula Do​p​t=Dc​Cm​i​nβsubscript𝐷𝑜𝑝𝑡subscript𝐷𝑐superscriptsubscript𝐶𝑚𝑖𝑛𝛽D_{opt}=D_{c}C_{min}^{\beta} in Figure 4, we obtain Dc=3.2subscript𝐷𝑐3.2D_{c}=3.2 and β=0.50𝛽0.50\beta=0.50, estimating the optimal number of trained tokens to be approximately 5.6T. Based on the same principle of smooth curves, and aiming to maximize the use of training data within the optimal cost-performance range to achieve the best possible model outcomes, we ultimately selected approximately 7T tokens for pre-training. These analyses ensure that Hunyuan-Large achieves optimal performance at the best possible cost-efficiency, while also facilitating the development of a future series of MoE models.
items.zh: 进一步，通过拟合图4中的公式D_opt = D_c C_min^β，我们得到D_c = 3.2，β = 0.50，估计最优训练标记数约为5.6T。基于相同的平滑曲线原则，并旨在在最优性价比范围内最大化利用训练数据以获得最佳模型结果，我们最终选择了约7T标记进行预训练。这些分析确保Hunyuan-Large以最优性价比实现最佳性能，同时也促进了未来系列MoE模型的开发。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Employing the same fitting strategy as Figure 3, we derive the scaling law of the optimal amount of training data under different minimum compute budgets.
items.capZh: 图4：采用与图3相同的拟合策略，我们得到了不同最小算力预算下最优训练数据量的缩放定律。

items.en: An optimal learning rate schedule is crucial for effective and stable training. Hunyuan-Large’s learning rate schedule is delineated into three sequential phases: an initial warmup phase, succeeded by a prolonged phase of gradual decay, and culminating in a concise annealing phase.
items.zh: 最优学习率调度对于有效且稳定的训练至关重要。混元大语言模型的学习率调度分为三个连续阶段：初始预热阶段，随后是长期逐渐衰减阶段，最后是简短的退火阶段。

items.en: The merit of the extended phase of gradual decay is its adeptness at balancing the exploration of the solution space with the convergence toward an optimal solution. By sustaining an elevated learning rate during the initial pre-training phase, the model is enabled to efficaciously navigate through diverse regions of the solution space, thereby averting premature convergence to suboptimal local minima. The incremental reduction in the learning rate as training progresses ensures a methodical convergence to a more optimal solution.
items.zh: 长期逐渐衰减阶段的优点在于它能够很好地平衡解空间的探索与向最优解的收敛。通过在初始预训练阶段维持较高的学习率，模型能够有效地遍历解空间的不同区域，从而避免过早收敛到次优局部最小值。随着训练的进行，学习率逐步降低，确保系统性地收敛到更优解。

items.en: In the concluding 5% of the pre-training tokens, we introduce a brief annealing phase, wherein the learning rate is reduced to one-tenth of its peak value. This approach facilitates the model in meticulously fine-tuning its parameters, thereby achieving a superior degree of generalization and, consequently, enhancing its overall performance. Furthermore, during this phase, we prioritize the use of the highest-quality dataset available, which plays a pivotal role in augmenting the model’s performance in the annealing phase.
items.zh: 在预训练词元的最后5%中，我们引入了一个简短的退火阶段，将学习率降至峰值的十分之一。这种方法有助于模型精细调整其参数，从而实现更好的泛化能力，进而提升整体性能。此外，在此阶段，我们优先使用可用的最高质量数据集，这对增强模型在退火阶段的性能起到了关键作用。

items.en: After the annealing phase, Hunyuan-Large is trained on longer sequences (up to 256K tokens) to enable its long-context capability. Specifically, the long-context pre-training phase contains two stages (i.e., gradually increases the token length as 32K→→\rightarrow256K). We adopt RoPE (Su et al., 2024) for building position embeddings, and scale the RoPE base frequency to 1 billion during the 256K pre-training stage inspired by Xiong et al. (2023).
items.zh: 退火阶段后，混元大语言模型在更长的序列（最多256K词元）上进行训练，以赋予其长上下文能力。具体来说，长上下文预训练阶段包含两个子阶段（即逐步将词元长度从32K增加到256K）。我们采用RoPE（Su等人，2024）构建位置嵌入，并在256K预训练阶段将RoPE基频缩放至10亿，受Xiong等人（2023）启发。

items.en: For the data, we solely rely on natural long-context data obtained from books and codes (comprising nearly 25%percent2525\% of the corpus) and mix it with normal-length pre-training data (nearly 75%percent7575\%) to form our long-context pre-training corpus, sharing similar conclusions observed in Gao et al. (2024). We also discover that it does not require too much training for LLM to acquire long-context capabilities. In each of the 32K and 256K stages, we employ a long-context pre-training corpus of approximately 10 billion tokens. The long-context pre-training at each stage can achieve satisfactory long-context abilities, while maintaining good LLM capabilities on tasks with normal lengths.
items.zh: 在数据方面，我们仅依赖从书籍和代码中获取的自然长上下文数据（约占语料库的25%），并将其与正常长度的预训练数据（约占75%）混合，形成我们的长上下文预训练语料库，这与Gao等人（2024）中观察到的结论相似。我们还发现，大语言模型获取长上下文能力不需要太多训练。在32K和256K两个阶段中，我们分别使用了约100亿词元的长上下文预训练语料库。每个阶段的长上下文预训练都能获得令人满意的长上下文能力，同时保持模型在正常长度任务上的良好性能。

items.en: Based on the pre-trained model of Hunyuan-Large, we further conduct a post-training stage that aims to enhance task-specific capabilities and align LLM to human preference. This stage contains a supervised fine-tuning (SFT) phase and a Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) phase on elaborately selected datasets and outputs of current policy models (Bai et al., 2022). The following subsections contain (a) the data selection, preprocessing, and training process of SFT, (b) the techniques and training strategies of Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) in RLHF.
items.zh: 基于混元大语言模型的预训练模型，我们进一步进行了后训练阶段，旨在增强特定任务能力并使大语言模型与人类偏好对齐。该阶段包括监督微调（SFT）阶段和基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）阶段，使用精心挑选的数据集和当前策略模型的输出（Bai等人，2022）。以下小节包含（a）SFT的数据选择、预处理和训练过程，（b）RLHF中直接偏好优化（DPO）的技术和训练策略。

items.en: The performance of SFT strongly depends on the quality of instruction data related to various types of LLM capabilities. In SFT, we concentrate on the detailed data collection and processing manners that ensure the effectiveness of Hunyuan-Large’s post-training, along with the training settings of SFT.
items.zh: SFT的性能在很大程度上取决于与各种大语言模型能力相关的指令数据的质量。在SFT中，我们专注于详细的数据收集和处理方法，以确保混元大语言模型后训练的有效性，以及SFT的训练设置。

items.en: The central goal of SFT is further enhancing its performance across multiple key capabilities based on the corresponding well-selected data. These capabilities primarily encompass mathematics, coding, logical reasoning, knowledge-based question answering, agent behavior, text generation, NLP comprehension, industrial applications, role-playing, long-text capabilities, etc. We recognize that improving these abilities not only enables the model to be more adept in practical applications, but also better satisfies users’ diverse needs across multiple scenarios. Simultaneously, we place great emphasis on data security, striving to ensure that the model aligns with human values under most circumstances. The overall SFT data volume exceeds 1 million.
items.zh: SFT的核心目标是在相应精心挑选的数据基础上，进一步增强模型在多个关键能力上的性能。这些能力主要包括数学、编码、逻辑推理、基于知识的问答、智能体行为、文本生成、自然语言理解、工业应用、角色扮演、长文本能力等。我们认识到，提升这些能力不仅能使模型在实际应用中更加熟练，还能更好地满足用户在多种场景下的多样化需求。同时，我们高度重视数据安全，努力确保模型在大多数情况下与人类价值观对齐。总体SFT数据量超过100万。

items.en: The key techniques of SFT data collection and processing mainly include instruction extraction, instruction generalization, instruction balancing, and data quality controlling.
items.zh: SFT数据收集和处理的关键技术主要包括指令提取、指令泛化、指令平衡和数据质量控制。

items.en: Instruction Extraction. To enhance the breadth and diversity of the instruction set, we develop an instruction extraction model specifically for domains such as mathematics, logical reasoning, and knowledge-based question answering, whose primary goal is to effectively extract data suitable for instruction tuning from publicly available data sources (e.g., web pages, encyclopedias, etc.). The extracted data includes both instructions and corresponding reference answers. We develop many specialized models as instruction extractors. With the help of these model, we successfully extract a large set of natural instructions from public data. These instructions play a crucial role as the seed to enhance the final model’s generalization performance and diversity.
items.zh: 指令提取。为了增强指令集的广度和多样性，我们专门针对数学、逻辑推理和基于知识的问答等领域开发了一个指令提取模型，其主要目标是从公开可用的数据源（如网页、百科全书等）中有效提取适合指令调优的数据。提取的数据包括指令和相应的参考答案。我们开发了许多专用模型作为指令提取器。借助这些模型，我们成功从公共数据中提取了大量自然指令。这些指令作为种子，对增强最终模型的泛化性能和多样性起到了关键作用。

items.en: Instruction Generalization. We propose an instruction generalization method to obtain more diverse and complex instructions in large quantities. Specifically, we design and train an instruction generalization system capable of generalizing targeted instructions while gradually increasing their difficulty and complexity levels. The central recipe of this system lies in training the model by synthesizing numerous mappings between simple and complex instructions. In addition, we construct a well-structured instruction taxonomy with its corresponding classification models, which aims to analyze and balance the distribution of various instruction types in SFT data. Armed with this instruction taxonomy, our instruction generalization system can supplement the original data on specific weak instructions of targeted types.
items.zh: 指令泛化。我们提出了一种指令泛化方法，以大量获得更多样化和复杂的指令。具体来说，我们设计并训练了一个指令泛化系统，能够泛化目标指令，同时逐步提高其难度和复杂度。该系统的核心在于通过合成大量简单指令与复杂指令之间的映射来训练模型。此外，我们构建了一个结构良好的指令分类体系及其对应的分类模型，旨在分析和平衡SFT数据中各种指令类型的分布。借助这个指令分类体系，我们的指令泛化系统可以针对特定类型的薄弱指令补充原始数据。

items.en: Instruction Balancing. Through the instruction extraction and generalization processes, we accumulate more than 101010 million instructions. Instruction balance is essential for enhancing the model’s performance across various scenarios. However, many generated instructions have very similar semantic meanings and the instruction type distribution is naturally unbalanced. To enhance the instruction complexity while maintaining balanced instruction distributions, we attach labels for each instruction. These labels encompass multiple dimensions. By meticulously tagging these labels, we can more accurately understand and analyze the characteristics of our instruction sets. By ensuring adequate amounts and balanced distribution of different types of instructions during the SFT process, we can effectively alleviate overfitting or underfitting problems on specific instruction types, thereby improving the model’s generalization capabilities and adaptability across diverse application scenarios.
items.zh: 指令平衡。通过指令提取和泛化过程，我们积累了超过1000万条指令。指令平衡对于增强模型在各种场景下的性能至关重要。然而，许多生成的指令语义非常相似，且指令类型分布自然不平衡。为了在保持平衡指令分布的同时提高指令复杂度，我们为每条指令附加标签。这些标签涵盖多个维度。通过仔细标记这些标签，我们可以更准确地理解和分析指令集的特征。通过在SFT过程中确保不同类型指令的数量充足且分布平衡，我们可以有效缓解特定指令类型的过拟合或欠拟合问题，从而提高模型在不同应用场景下的泛化能力和适应性。

items.en: Data Quality Controlling. The quality of SFT data is the foundation of superior performance. We mainly conduct the following three methods to ensure the high quality of our SFT data.
items.zh: 数据质量控制。SFT数据的质量是卓越性能的基础。我们主要采用以下三种方法来确保SFT数据的高质量。

items.en: Rule-based Filtering. We discover some common issues such as data truncation errors, duplication, garbled characters, and format errors in SFT data. Consequently, we develop a set of rule-based data filtering strategies to prevent the above instruction extraction and generation models from producing undesirable outputs.
items.zh: 基于规则的过滤。我们发现SFT数据中存在一些常见问题，如数据截断错误、重复、乱码和格式错误。因此，我们开发了一套基于规则的数据过滤策略，以防止上述指令提取和生成模型产生不良输出。

items.en: Model-based Filtering. To automatically extract high-quality SFT data from a substantial volume of synthesized instruction data, we train a critique model (McAleese et al., 2024) based on a 70B dense model of our Hunyuan series. This model assigns a four-tier quality score to each instruction sample, assessing aspects such as the accuracy, relevance, completeness, usefulness, and clarity of the generated responses, and other possible data quality issues.
items.zh: 基于模型的过滤。为了从大量合成指令数据中自动提取高质量的SFT数据，我们基于混元系列的70B稠密模型训练了一个评判模型（McAleese等人，2024）。该模型为每个指令样本分配四个等级的质量评分，评估生成响应的准确性、完整性、有用性、清晰度等方面，以及其他可能的数据质量问题。

items.en: Human-based Filtering. Prior to model training, the SFT data filtered via rule-based and model-based methods further undergo human annotation, ensuring that answers adhere to the desired task-specific response patterns and avoid introducing additional low-quality issues.
items.zh: 基于人工的过滤。在模型训练之前，经过基于规则和基于模型方法过滤的SFT数据进一步经过人工标注，确保答案符合期望的任务特定响应模式，并避免引入额外的低质量问题。

items.en: In SFT, we fine-tune the pre-trained model based on the high-quality data (more than 1 million) for a total of 3 epochs. The learning rate decays from 2e-5 to 2e-6. To mitigate overfitting during SFT, we utilize an attention dropout of 0.1 and a hidden dropout of 0.2. We find that, compared to the dense models, the MoE architecture of Hunyuan series could benefit more from incorporating suitable dropout rates.
items.zh: 在SFT中，我们基于高质量数据（超过100万条）对预训练模型进行微调，共3个周期。学习率从2e-5衰减到2e-6。为了缓解SFT期间的过拟合，我们使用了0.1的注意力丢弃率和0.2的隐藏丢弃率。我们发现，与稠密模型相比，混元系列的MoE架构可以从引入适当的丢弃率中获益更多。

full.secZh: 3.2 基于人类反馈的强化学习

items.en: To align Hunyuan-Large with human preferences, we further train our SFT model using DPO (Rafailov et al., 2024). We adopt a single-stage training strategy that integrates both offline and online training, which demonstrates superior controllability and overall performance. In this integrated approach, we utilize a pre-compiled preference dataset to enhance controllability, while simultaneously employing the current policy model to generate multiple responses for each prompt and our reward model to select the most and least preferred responses.
items.zh: 为了使混元大语言模型与人类偏好对齐，我们进一步使用DPO（Rafailov等人，2024）训练我们的SFT模型。我们采用了一种结合离线和在线训练的单阶段训练策略，该策略表现出更好的可控性和整体性能。在这种集成方法中，我们利用预编译的偏好数据集来增强可控性，同时使用当前策略模型为每个提示生成多个响应，并由我们的奖励模型选择最偏好和最不偏好的响应。

items.en: To enhance training stability, we incorporate an SFT loss term on the chosen response, similar to the approaches in (Dubey et al., 2024; Adler et al., 2024). This addition helps stabilize DPO training by preventing a decrease in the log probability of chosen responses. Furthermore, we implement an exponential moving average strategy to mitigate reward hacking and reduce alignment tax (Ouyang et al., 2022), ensuring a more stable training process across a larger dataset.
items.zh: 为了增强训练稳定性，我们在所选响应上加入了一个SFT损失项，类似于（Dubey等人，2024；Adler等人，2024）中的方法。这通过防止所选响应的对数概率下降来帮助稳定DPO训练。此外，我们实施指数移动平均策略以减轻奖励黑客攻击并减少对齐税（Ouyang等人，2022），确保在更大数据集上实现更稳定的训练过程。

items.en: We conduct extensive evaluations of Hunyuan-Large to demonstrate its effectiveness. The following experiments concentrate on our pre-trained language model (in Sec. 4.1) and post-trained language model (in Sec. 4.2) on various tasks in Chinese and English, including math and reasoning, code, reading comprehension, commonsense, long context, and aggregated task, etc., where Hunyuan-Large achieves excellent performance among tasks in both pre-training and post-training.
items.zh: 我们对混元大语言模型进行了广泛评估以证明其有效性。以下实验集中于我们的预训练语言模型（第4.1节）和后训练语言模型（第4.2节）在中文和英文的各种任务上，包括数学与推理、代码、阅读理解、常识、长上下文和聚合任务等，混元大语言模型在预训练和后训练的任务中均取得了优异性能。

items.en: In this section, we report the performance of Hunyuan-Large’s pre-trained model on various types of widely-used benchmarks, verifying the power of the fundamental capability of our model.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们报告了 Hunyuan-Large 预训练模型在各种广泛使用的基准测试上的性能，验证了我们模型基础能力的力量。

items.en: Key Benchmarks. We evaluate Hunyuan-Large on a large number of widely-used benchmarks of various tasks, including commonsense understanding, machine comprehension, question answering, math and reasoning, coding, and aggregated tasks, in both English and Chinese. Specifically, we choose MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021), MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024b), BBH (Suzgun et al., 2022), CMMLU (Li et al., 2023), and C-Eval (Huang et al., 2024) for the aggregated evaluations. HellaSwag (Zellers et al., 2019), CommonsenseQA (Talmor et al., 2019), and WinoGrande (Sakaguchi et al., 2021) are adopted to measure our model on commonsense understanding, while PIQA (Bisk et al., 2020) is specially for physical related commonsense. We also select DROP (Dua et al., 2019), C3 (Sun et al., 2020) and NaturalQuestions(Kwiatkowski et al., 2019) to evaluate LLMs on their basic capabilities on classical NLP tasks such as question answering and reading comprehension. ARC-C (Clark et al., 2018), TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017) are added as QA tasks that require certain background related to science and updated world knowledge. Finally, we evaluate LLMs on GSM8k (Cobbe et al., 2021), MATH Hendrycks et al. (2021), and CMATH (Wei et al., 2023) to measure the mathematics capability, and on HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021) and MBPP (Austin et al., 2021) for coding, which are representative and essential LLM abilities.
items.zh: 关键基准测试。我们在大量广泛使用的各种任务基准测试上评估 Hunyuan-Large，包括常识理解、机器阅读理解、问答、数学与推理、编码以及聚合任务，涵盖英文和中文。具体来说，我们选择 MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021)、MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024b)、BBH (Suzgun et al., 2022)、CMMLU (Li et al., 2023) 和 C-Eval (Huang et al., 2024) 进行聚合评估。采用 HellaSwag (Zellers et al., 2019)、CommonsenseQA (Talmor et al., 2019) 和 WinoGrande (Sakaguchi et al., 2021) 来衡量模型在常识理解方面的表现，而 PIQA (Bisk et al., 2020) 专门用于物理相关的常识。我们还选择了 DROP (Dua et al., 2019)、C3 (Sun et al., 2020) 和 NaturalQuestions (Kwiatkowski et al., 2019) 来评估 LLM 在经典 NLP 任务（如问答和阅读理解）上的基本能力。ARC-C (Clark et al., 2018) 和 TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017) 被添加为需要一定科学背景和最新世界知识的问答任务。最后，我们在 GSM8k (Cobbe et al., 2021)、MATH (Hendrycks et al., 2021) 和 CMATH (Wei et al., 2023) 上评估 LLM 的数学能力，在 HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021) 和 MBPP (Austin et al., 2021) 上评估编码能力，这些是代表性且重要的 LLM 能力。

items.en: Evaluation Settings and Competitors. We follow the commonly used evaluation settings (e.g., evaluation metrics and the numbers of shots) of various types of benchmarks in experiments. Precisely, we adopt zero-shot for TriviaQA, PIQA, C3, HumanEval, 3-shot for BBH, MBPP, DROP, CMATH, 4-shot for GSM8K, MATH, 5-shot for MMLU, MMLU-Pro, C-Eval, CMMLU, WinoGrande, NaturalQuestions, 7-shot for CommonsenseQA, 10-shot for HellaSwag and 25-shot for ARC-C. We compare Hunyuan-Large with the state-of-the-art Dense and MoE pre-trained models of comparable or larger (activated) parameter sizes. Specifically, these competitors include LLama3.1-70B (Dubey et al., 2024), Mixtral-8x22B (Mistral, 2024), DeepSeek-V2 (DeepSeek-AI, 2024) and LLama3.1-405B. For fair comparisons, we report the best performance among the results that are publicly reported or those reproduced by ourselves for baselines.
items.zh: 评估设置与竞争对手。我们在实验中遵循各种基准测试的常用评估设置（例如，评估指标和样本数）。具体来说，我们对 TriviaQA、PIQA、C3、HumanEval 采用零样本，对 BBH、MBPP、DROP、CMATH 采用 3 样本，对 GSM8K、MATH 采用 4 样本，对 MMLU、MMLU-Pro、C-Eval、CMMLU、WinoGrande、NaturalQuestions 采用 5 样本，对 CommonsenseQA 采用 7 样本，对 HellaSwag 采用 10 样本，对 ARC-C 采用 25 样本。我们将 Hunyuan-Large 与最先进的、参数规模相当或更大（激活参数）的 Dense 和 MoE 预训练模型进行比较。具体来说，这些竞争对手包括 LLama3.1-70B (Dubey et al., 2024)、Mixtral-8x22B (Mistral, 2024)、DeepSeek-V2 (DeepSeek-AI, 2024) 和 LLama3.1-405B。为了公平比较，我们报告了公开报告的结果或我们自己复现的基线结果中的最佳性能。

items.en: We present the results of the post-trained model of Hunyuan-Large, i.e., Hunyuan-Large-Instruct, on dozens of benchmarks to verify its effectiveness across different LLM capabilities.
items.zh: 我们展示了 Hunyuan-Large 后训练模型（即 Hunyuan-Large-Instruct）在数十个基准测试上的结果，以验证其在不同 LLM 能力上的有效性。

items.en: We directly adopt some benchmarks used in the evaluation of pre-training as the datasets to confirm the post-trained model’s capability, which concentrate on the machine comprehension, question answering, commonsense reasoning, mathematics, coding, and aggregated tasks in both English and Chinese. For fair comparisons, we follow the classical evaluation settings such as metrics and the numbers of shots for different benchmark datasets. As for baselines, we choose LLama3.1-405B-Instruct (Dubey et al., 2024), LLama3.1-70B-Instruct, Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct (Mistral, 2024), and DeepSeek-V2.5-Chat (DeepSeek-AI, 2024), which are powerful dense or MoE models with the similar (activated) parameter sizes. We follow the setting of the pre-training evaluation, reporting the best performance among the publicly reported scores and the results that we reproduced.
items.zh: 我们直接采用预训练评估中使用的一些基准测试作为数据集，以确认后训练模型的能力，这些基准测试集中在机器阅读理解、问答、常识推理、数学、编码以及中英文聚合任务上。为了公平比较，我们遵循经典评估设置，如不同基准数据集的指标和样本数。对于基线，我们选择 LLama3.1-405B-Instruct (Dubey et al., 2024)、LLama3.1-70B-Instruct、Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct (Mistral, 2024) 和 DeepSeek-V2.5-Chat (DeepSeek-AI, 2024)，这些是具有相似（激活）参数规模的强大 Dense 或 MoE 模型。我们遵循预训练评估的设置，报告公开得分和我们复现结果中的最佳性能。

items.en: In our pursuit to thoroughly evaluate the capabilities of Hunyuan-Large-Instruct, we further conduct comparisons on AlignBench (Liu et al., 2023), MT-Bench (Zheng et al., 2023), IFEval strict-prompt (Zhou et al., 2023), Arena-Hard (Li et al., 2024b), and AlpacaEval-2.0 (Dubois et al., 2024), as Table 4 shows. (1). AlignBench is a benchmark designed to assess the alignment between model outputs and human intentions, particularly focusing on the model’s ability to follow instructions accurately and generate responses that are in line with user expectations. (2). MT-Bench is an expert-level human preference benchmark for LLMs. (3). IFEval is a benchmark that specifically targets the model’s performance in following strict prompts, thereby testing its precision and adherence to specific instructions within a given context. (4). Arena-Hard robustly differentiates model capabilities, aligns closely with human preferences in real-world scenarios, and is frequently updated with new prompts to prevent over-fitting and ensure ongoing relevance. (5). AlpacaEval-2.0 is also a commonly-used benchmark to automatically evaluate the LLMs’ instruction following abilities. Hunyuan-Large-Instruct shows the best overall performance on these five benchmarks compared to all the strong baseline models. It is implied that the impressive performance of Hunyuan-Large-Instruct could mainly attribute to its powerful pre-trained model, the high-quality SFT and DPO data with the well-designed four-step data collection and processing that generates this data, and the superior SFT and DPO training strategies.
items.zh: 为了全面评估 Hunyuan-Large-Instruct 的能力，我们进一步在 AlignBench (Liu et al., 2023)、MT-Bench (Zheng et al., 2023)、IFEval strict-prompt (Zhou et al., 2023)、Arena-Hard (Li et al., 2024b) 和 AlpacaEval-2.0 (Dubois et al., 2024) 上进行了比较，如表 4 所示。(1) AlignBench 是一个旨在评估模型输出与人类意图对齐程度的基准测试，特别关注模型准确遵循指令并生成符合用户期望的响应的能力。(2) MT-Bench 是一个用于 LLM 的专家级人类偏好基准测试。(3) IFEval 是一个专门针对模型在严格遵循指令方面表现的基准测试，从而测试其在给定上下文中精确遵循特定指令的能力。(4) Arena-Hard 能够稳健地区分模型能力，与真实场景中的人类偏好高度一致，并经常更新新提示以防止过拟合并确保持续相关性。(5) AlpacaEval-2.0 也是一个常用的自动评估 LLM 指令遵循能力的基准测试。Hunyuan-Large-Instruct 在这五个基准测试上相比所有强基线模型表现出最佳整体性能。这表明 Hunyuan-Large-Instruct 的出色性能主要归功于其强大的预训练模型、高质量 SFT 和 DPO 数据（通过精心设计的四步数据收集和处理生成）以及卓越的 SFT 和 DPO 训练策略。

items.en: To comprehensively assess the long-context performance of Hunyuan-Large-Instruct, we undertook a series of comprehensive assessments employing two widely recognized open-source benchmarks, i.e., RULER (Hsieh et al., 2024) and LV-Eval (Yuan et al., 2024). In addition, we introduce a self-developed long-context benchmark, i.e., PenguinScrolls, for further comparisons. We select LLama3.1-70B-Instruct as a strong baseline due to its well-documented strength in processing extended contexts.
items.zh: 为了全面评估 Hunyuan-Large-Instruct 的长上下文性能，我们使用两个广泛认可的开源基准测试（即 RULER (Hsieh et al., 2024) 和 LV-Eval (Yuan et al., 2024)）进行了一系列综合评估。此外，我们引入了一个自研的长上下文基准测试 PenguinScrolls 以进行进一步比较。我们选择 LLama3.1-70B-Instruct 作为强基线，因为其在处理长上下文方面有充分记录的强大能力。

items.en: RULER. RULER encompasses a diverse set of task categories, including retrieval, multi-hop reasoning, aggregation, and question answering. Each task spans varying context lengths, offering a flexible and comprehensive evaluation framework for assessing LLMs’ long-context competencies. As depicted in Table 5, Hunyuan-Large-Instruct maintains consistently high performance across different lengths. Notably, in the 64K to 128K token range, Hunyuan-Large-Instruct significantly outperforms the baseline model, exhibiting minimal performance degradation with increasing length and demonstrating superior stability in handling extended text inputs.
items.zh: RULER。RULER 包含多种任务类别，包括检索、多跳推理、聚合和问答。每个任务跨越不同的上下文长度，为评估 LLM 的长上下文能力提供了灵活且全面的评估框架。如表 5 所示，Hunyuan-Large-Instruct 在不同长度下均保持稳定高性能。值得注意的是，在 64K 到 128K token 范围内，Hunyuan-Large-Instruct 显著优于基线模型，随着长度增加性能下降极小，展现出在处理长文本输入方面的卓越稳定性。

items.en: LV-Eval. LV-Eval is a challenging long-context benchmark comprising 111111 distinct question-answering datasets, designed to test models across varying context lengths and challenging scenarios with confounding facts. To address the high false-negative rates caused by overly stringent original metrics, we employed LLM as an evaluator, providing a more accurate reflection of model performance. As illustrated in Table 5, Hunyuan-Large-Instruct consistently outperforms LLama3.1-70B-Instruct across all length intervals, underscoring its excellence in long-context processing.
items.zh: LV-Eval。LV-Eval 是一个具有挑战性的长上下文基准测试，包含 111111 个不同的问答数据集，旨在测试模型在不同上下文长度和包含混淆事实的挑战性场景下的表现。为了解决原始指标过于严格导致的高假阴性率问题，我们采用 LLM 作为评估器，更准确地反映模型性能。如表 5 所示，Hunyuan-Large-Instruct 在所有长度区间内始终优于 LLama3.1-70B-Instruct，突显了其在长上下文处理方面的卓越能力。

items.en: To address the gaps in existing benchmarks, such as insufficient real-world content diversity and lack of multilingual and multi-turn dialogue data, we developed PenguinScrolls. This benchmark aims to guide the optimization of LLMs’ long-text capabilities and align evaluation metrics with genuine user perceptions of LLMs’ performance.
items.zh: 为了解决现有基准测试的不足，如真实世界内容多样性不足以及缺乏多语言和多轮对话数据，我们开发了 PenguinScrolls。该基准测试旨在指导 LLM 长文本能力的优化，并使评估指标与用户对 LLM 性能的真实感知保持一致。

items.en: PenguinScrolls offers the following advantages: (1). Document diversity: Involves a wide range of natural long-form texts, including financial reports, legal documents, and academic papers, with contexts extending up to 128K tokens. (2). Fine-grained task types: Features multi-level tasks of varying difficulty, constructing a comprehensive task classification system rooted in long-context processing abilities. (3). Multi-turn dialogue data: Incorporates human-simulated questioning to create authentic long-context multi-turn dialogue scenarios. (4). Multilingual support: Provides data in both Chinese and English to meet the needs of multilingual applications.
items.zh: PenguinScrolls 具有以下优势：(1) 文档多样性：涉及广泛的自然长文本，包括财务报告、法律文件和学术论文，上下文长度可达 128K token。(2) 细粒度任务类型：包含不同难度的多层次任务，构建了基于长上下文处理能力的全面任务分类体系。(3) 多轮对话数据：融入模拟人类提问，创建真实的长上下文多轮对话场景。(4) 多语言支持：提供中英文数据，满足多语言应用需求。

items.en: PenguinScrolls is a high-quality dataset capable of effectively guiding the optimization of long-context processing capabilities. It encompasses four distinct tasks, i.e., information extraction, information localization, qualitative analysis and numerical reasoning. As shown in Table 6, Hunyuan-Large-Instruct demonstrates superior performance over LLama3.1-70B-Instruct across all these tasks. Internal user studies corroborate that the improvements on PenguinScrolls strongly correlate with enhancements in actual user experiences. We will release PenguinScrolls to advance long-context research and development in the future.
items.zh: PenguinScrolls 是一个高质量数据集，能够有效指导长上下文处理能力的优化。它包含四个不同的任务：信息提取、信息定位、定性分析和数值推理。如表 6 所示，Hunyuan-Large-Instruct 在所有任务上均表现出优于 LLama3.1-70B-Instruct 的性能。内部用户研究证实，PenguinScrolls 上的改进与真实用户体验的提升高度相关。我们将发布 PenguinScrolls 以推动未来的长上下文研究和开发。

items.en: This technical report presents Hunyuan-Large, the currently largest and best-performing Transformer-based MoE model, which has an unprecedented 389B total parameters and 52B activated parameters, being able to support up to 256K context length. Extensive evaluations demonstrate Hunyuan-Large’s remarkable performance on dozens of benchmarks, reflecting its impressive LLM capabilities in language understanding, generation, reasoning, mathematics, coding, long context, and aggregated tasks. The favorable outcomes of our models are largely attributed to our high-quality training data armed with data synthesis, superior model structure, and sophisticated training recipes in both pre-training and post-training. We have released the model weights of Hunyuan-Large to facilitate the community, looking forward to inspiring future research innovations and practical applications and achieving positive social impact. We also hope that the release of the largest and overall best-performing MoE-based Hunyuan-Large could spark more ripple of debate about more promising techniques of LLMs among the community, in turn to further improve our model from more practical aspects and contribute to the more helpful AGI in the future.
items.zh: 本技术报告介绍了 Hunyuan-Large，这是目前最大且性能最佳的基于 Transformer 的 MoE 模型，拥有前所未有的 389B 总参数和 52B 激活参数，能够支持高达 256K 的上下文长度。大量评估表明，Hunyuan-Large 在数十个基准测试上表现出色，反映了其在语言理解、生成、推理、数学、编码、长上下文和聚合任务方面的卓越 LLM 能力。我们模型的良好结果主要归功于高质量的训练数据（配备数据合成）、优越的模型结构以及预训练和后训练中精细的训练方案。我们已发布 Hunyuan-Large 的模型权重以促进社区发展，期待激发未来的研究创新和实际应用，并产生积极的社会影响。我们也希望发布最大且整体性能最佳的基于 MoE 的 Hunyuan-Large 能够引发社区关于更有前景的 LLM 技术的更多讨论，从而从更实际的角度进一步改进我们的模型，并为未来更有用的 AGI 做出贡献。

items.en: Hunyuan-Large has seen significant participation and contributions from many teams at Tencent, for which we are deeply grateful. Here, we acknowledge the most central contributors involved in this project.
items.zh: Hunyuan-Large 得到了腾讯许多团队的重要参与和贡献，我们对此深表感谢。在此，我们感谢参与该项目的最核心贡献者。
